variants.title: HiFi Filter SD 70380 Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 546-SET
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SD 70380 Urea Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAB 546-SET. Easy to install and replace, the SD 70380 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter U 5001 KIT Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB546-SET
variants.description: The compact MANN-FILTER urea filters are characterized by high filter fineness, proven suitability for everyday use and a long service life. They protect system components against wear and failure and are resistant to frost and ammonia. MANN-FILTER urea filters are available for leading SCR systems in trucks and buses.
